news.headline: Iran hits Qatar gas operations in response to Israeli attack
news.summary: Qatar’s main gas facility is among the energy sites targeted by Iran after its own main gas field was hit in an attack.

news.headline: Swallowing pieces of silk, eating cacti or just 1 meal a day – all in pursuit of thinness in ancient China
news.summary:
Long before calorie counting and healthy diets, women in ancient China were already under intense pressure to stay slim, even swallowing cacti or silk in pursuit of what was perceived as perfection.
Many assume ancient Chinese women prized fuller figures, but the reality was more nuanced.
